title: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Microbiology
content: Galgotias University doctoral program in Microbiology require students to develop research-based aptitude leading to advanced study of microorganisms which are microscopic, unicellular and cell-cluster organisms. This advanced degree incorporates various fields of biological sciences such as genetics, forensics, molecular biology, food sciences and biochemistry. The program emphasis is also laid on to encourage students to participate in several seminars, project works, and research in scientific laboratories, analyze the results, and publish the findings in academic journals.
